title: verbascum × mixtum
intro: Verbascum × mixtum, also known as the Mullein-Verbascum hybrid, is a plant species that belongs to the figwort family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting a good night's sleep. Verbascum × mixtum can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
